prompt: Create a hyper-dynamic commercial poster for a X-SUGAR energy drink, in a high-contrast neon sports-advertising style. Use a vertical poster layout with a dark electric-blue and black background, dramatic lighting, rain droplets, motion streaks, lightning, and liquid splash effects. The centerpiece is one oversized aluminum can tilted diagonally to the right, floating above a glowing splash impact. The can is matte black with water condensation, a metallic silver rim, a bright lime-green pull tab, and a huge jagged X logo in lime green and electric blue across the front. On the can, include the text "EXTREME ENERGY" near the top rim, the main brand name "X-SUGAR", the subtitle "ENERGY DRINK", the flavor line "CITRUS BLAST", the phrase "NATURALLY FLAVORED", and the size "16 FL OZ (473 mL)". Behind and around the can, show explosive blue and neon-green liquid splashes, electric arcs, glowing particles, and speed energy trails. In the top left, place a small brand mark reading "Pollo AI" with "GPT Image 2" beneath it. Across the upper left to center, add a huge brush-lettered headline in layered colors: "UNLEASH YOUR ENERGY", with "UNLEASH" in acid lime, "YOUR" in white, and "ENERGY" in vivid electric blue, all in rough painted typography. Under the headline, add the slogan "POWER. FOCUS. DOMINATE." with the three words colored lime, blue, and orange. In the top right, place an angled lime-green sticker with black text reading "NEW EXTREME FORMULA". On the left side, add one slanted dark feature panel with the heading "FUEL YOUR EVERY MOVE" and exactly 3 feature bullets with icons: 1) a yellow lightning bolt icon with "EXPLOSIVE ENERGY", 2) a blue target icon with "SHARP FOCUS", 3) an orange running figure icon with "MAXIMUM PERFORMANCE". On the right side, add exactly 3 standalone circular icon callouts stacked vertically: 1) yellow lightning icon with "MORE ENERGY MORE YOU", 2) blue brain icon with "MENTAL CLARITY ALL DAY", 3) orange flexed arm icon with "BUILT FOR CHAMPIONS". At the bottom left, include a silhouetted male runner sprinting forward with green, blue, and orange speed trails behind him. Along the bottom edge, show a futuristic city skyline with glowing windows reflected on a wet street surface. Add a bright lime brushstroke banner at the bottom with the text "RISE ABOVE. STAY UNSTOPPABLE." Overall mood: aggressive, exhilarating, powerful, premium fitness marketing, ultra-polished product poster, precise text rendering, crisp print-ready composition.
